name: Moon Mirror Shield
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>月</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鏡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>盾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たて</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If the equipped monster battles your opponent's monster, during damage calculation: The equipped monster's ATK/DEF become equal to the ATK or DEF (whichever is higher) of the opponent's battling monster +100, during damage calculation only. If this face-up card is sent from the field to the GY: Pay 500 LP; place this card on either the top or bottom of your Deck.
eff: If the equipped monster battles your opponent's monster, during damage calculation: The equipped monster's ATK/DEF become equal to the ATK or DEF (whichever is higher) of the opponent's battling monster +100, during damage calculation only. If this face-up card is sent from the field to the GY: Pay 500 LP; place this card on either the top or bottom of your Deck.

action: Places itself from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
Places itself from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
